patch.value: GH-635: plan create cannot forward strict Plan-required metadata
pm plan create delegates to strict Plan creation but does not expose the required generic create metadata flags, so the recovery bundle recommends flags the command path rejects.

Plan creation forwards every applicable type-required create field through the public SDK; recovery suggests only flags accepted by the active command path; strict and progressive profiles have CLI/SDK/MCP parity; regression and contract tests pass
Run pm plan create with Plan-specific fields while strict Plan policy requires generic metadata; retry the emitted --status or related suggestion and observe unknown-option failure.
The plan workflow can satisfy the active Plan type policy or emits an executable recovery path.
Strict creation reports missing generic fields that pm plan create cannot accept.
Agents cannot use the governed plan workflow in strict projects without dropping to a multi-command workaround.

value.author: codex-relationship-backfill-20260721
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-21: searched every pm status for GH-635,plan create strict required fields,and recovery-required Plan metadata. No exact owner exists; closed pm-je50 is the shipped plan-SDK lineage,while pm-qmjx/pm-4bzq/pm-3rjo cover adjacent help and recovery behavior.
